title: SMC Completo [PFX]
author: prodigiofx26
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: SMC Completo [PFX] by prodigiofx26.
This TradingView Pine Script identifies and plots Supply and Demand zones (Order Blocks) and Fair Value Gaps (FVG) based on swing highs and lows.

It allows configurable limits for the number of internal OBs, swing OBs, and FVGs displayed, while maintaining market structure detection and trailing swing levels." If you want, I can also make an even shorter 1-line version that’s perfect for a TradingView publish description.
Do you want me to do that?
